7209.title: Haunted Case Files
7209.description: In Ontario cottage country, an investigator is stalked by a terrifying beast-like entity; in Ohio, Karlo and his team are frozen in fear when they come face to face with the ghost of an executioner on an old jail's death row.

7250.title: Haunted Case Files
7250.description: Michelle Desrochers' dream trip to Transylvania turns into a nightmare, while in New York, paranormal investigators are attacked by a dangerous entity stalking an old church.

7291.title: Haunted Case Files
7291.description: The spirit of a murderer tries to possess an investigator in an Ohio library, and a woman is terrorised by shadow-like figures in her home in Massachusetts.

7332.title: Haunted Case Files
7332.description: A woman and her teenage daughter are terrorised by apparitions, while in Arizona, something sinister is found lurking in an abandoned factory.
